TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pyanan = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Pyanan. 259 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 857 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 806 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 51 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal86%, Amis1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = pjanan = gaga mniq jilan tatuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ pjanan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Pyanan = Gaga mniq Yilan Tatungsyang ka alang Pyanan. 259 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 857 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 806 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 51 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal86%, Amis1%, Truku1%, ni rahuq na o5%.
S.PHON: = pjanan = gaga mniq jilan tatuŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ pjanan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tajal**%, amis*%, tɾuku*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
